en.extract:
The  Burmese myna (Acridotheres burmannicus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Myanmar and Yunnan, China. 


Taxonomy
The Burmese myna was considered conspecific with the vinous-breasted myna. Common names of the two split species were changed to "mynas" instead of "starlings" to match the genus.


References

The  '''Burmese myna''' ('''''Acridotheres burmannicus''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]].<ref name = col>{{Catalogue of Life  |id=9KHK |title=Acridotheres burmannicus (Jerdon, 1862) |option= |access-date=4 May 2021}}</ref> It is found in [[Myanmar]] and [[Yunnan]], [[China]].<ref name="iucn"/> 

== Taxonomy ==
The Burmese myna was considered conspecific with the [[vinous-breasted myna]]. Common names of the two split species were changed to "mynas" instead of "starlings" to match the genus.<ref name=ioc>{{cite web| editor1-last=Gill | editor1-first=Frank | editor1-link=Frank Gill (ornithologist) | editor2-last=Donsker | editor2-first=David | editor3-last=Rasmussen | editor3-first=Pamela | editor3-link=Pamela Rasmussen | date=January 2023 | title=Chats, Old World flycatchers | work=IOC World Bird List Version 13.1 | url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/chats/ | publisher=International Ornithologists' Union | access-date=7 February 2023}}</ref>

zh.extract:
红嘴椋鸟（学名：Acridotheres burmannicus），又名葡萄胸椋鳥，为椋鸟科八哥属的鸟类。分布于缅甸、泰国、柬埔寨以及中国大陆的云南等地，多见于热带开阔地次生林和灌木林中以及活动于河谷耕作区。该物种的模式产地在缅甸。


亚种
红嘴椋鸟指名亚种（学名：Sturnus burmannicus burmannicus）。在中国大陆，分布于云南等地。该物种的模式产地在缅甸。


参考文献

 葡萄胸椋鸟 Acridotheres burmannicus Jerdon, 1862. 台湾物种名录. 台湾: 中央研究院生物多样性研究中心.   [2013-01-24] （中文（台湾））.
